findings.title: Upstream planned_pack_id drift branch is untested
findings.evidence: The review noted the assembler guarded both pack_id and planned_pack_id, but only pack_id drift was tested before adjudication.
findings.recommended_action: Add a negative case mutating only planned_pack_id and assert upstream pack mismatch.

findings.title: No direct tamper test for result-validator boundary flags
findings.evidence: The review noted result-validator boundary and exact-key rejection were only indirectly tested before adjudication.
findings.recommended_action: Add negative tests for a flipped boundary flag and an extra result key.

parsed_review.summary: CP00-084 cleanly consumes CP00-083 and binds RP00.P07.M05.S01-S10 as metadata-only permission/audit failure taxonomy and customer-safe failure-message contracts. No P0/P1/P2 findings; P3 test-symmetry findings fixed before closeout.
